title: Trivo's Food Recipes
description: Add more vanilla food combinations to your world!
body:
## Most different combinations of all vanilla foods are made possible here!

![Available Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50a58e71339fef36252ea57783479522c5caae6a.png) 


**Add more vanilla food combinations to your world!**
**Some have unique effects and some take longer to eat,**
**Golden chocolates can be found in structures!**
**All recipes in media.**

### **Tips:**
- **Burgers, Filled Baked Potatoes, and Caramel are slower to eat.**
- **Cut Bread and Fried Eggs are faster to eat.**
- **Crumbs are eaten very fast!**
- **Caramel gives you a haste boost!**
